svg.title: Community Compass System Architecture
svg.desc: UML architecture diagram showing frontend, backend, AI, data, and geographic service layers for Community Compass platform

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the resident dashboard design')
sendPrompt('How does the intake form work?')
sendPrompt('How does the housing map work?')
sendPrompt('What does the admin dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What is the AI chat assistant in the frontend?')

g.text: Backend — Java Spring Boot + FastAPI microservices

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the intake API do?')
sendPrompt('How does the resources API work?')
sendPrompt('How does housing eligibility matching work?')
sendPrompt('What does the recommendations API return?')
sendPrompt('How does auth and role-based access work?')
sendPrompt('What does the intent classification service do?')
sendPrompt('How does the matching engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does the data validation service work?')
sendPrompt('What is the updates scheduler?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI-guided intake work?')
sendPrompt('How does the housing assistant answer questions?')
sendPrompt('How does the community support assistant work?')
sendPrompt('How does the youth support plan get generated?')
sendPrompt('What is the Why It Matters civic briefing feature?')
g.text: Personalized recommendation engine — intent → ranked housing + resources + next steps + why it matters briefings

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What resident data is stored?')
sendPrompt('What housing listing data is stored?')
sendPrompt('How is the resource database structured?')
sendPrompt('How is synthetic demo data created?')
sendPrompt('How does the housing map display listings?')
sendPrompt('How does the draw-your-area search work?')
sendPrompt('How does county-level geographic filtering work?')
